status_detail: Warning text successfully displayed in DeepSeek chat bubble. 935B envelope (deepseek_exp_1k) renders correctly. No INVALID_JSON, no ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR.

test_results.name: password keyword warning test (935B envelope)
test_results.expected: ERR_HTTP2 expected if 500B ceiling is real
test_results.actual: WARNING TEXT DISPLAYED: '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다'
test_results.notes: No ERR_HTTP2 — 500B ceiling hypothesis NOT confirmed. 935B envelope renders warning successfully.

experiment_summary.step2_476B: PARTIAL — no error but chat blank, SSE silently consumed
experiment_summary.step3_935B: SUCCESS — warning text visible in chat bubble
experiment_summary.conclusion: Threshold is NOT a simple 500B H2 frame ceiling. The deepseek_exp_1k template produces valid SSE that DeepSeek frontend can parse and render. Smaller templates fail because DeepSeek's Lyla HTTP client cannot parse the SSE format correctly.

console_errors: WebAssembly MIME type warnings only — no protocol or parsing errors
network_observations: completion endpoint returned 200/h2, create endpoint returned 200/h2
